nonClosureRule: A bounded implementation may advance status but must not delete source text, erase remaining obligations, or claim the whole idea from a proxy.

obligations.invariant: No release or proxy may be called the complete Bubble universe while a recorded reasonable consequence remains unrealizable.
remainingLimits: The completeness frontier and the closure rule for newly derived reasonable concepts remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Always live until the author accepts a complete connected realization and its derivation ledger.

obligations.invariant: Change, reversibility, recurrence, causal order, and irreversible history remain distinct without a mandatory scalar clock.
remainingLimits: The bounded causal frontiers have no cyclic trajectory, duration, metric time, persistent recurrence, or cross-world synchronization calculus.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen for every world law requiring concurrency, cycles, duration, or cross-bubble order.

obligations.invariant: World continuation follows from one coupled lawful structure and never from a hidden host selector or an unrelated menu of regimes.
remainingLimits: The v0.5.2 causal seam is finite once-per-realization closure; persistent dynamics, emergent entity boundaries, cross-world transfer, and complete universe generation remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open until the coupled causal substrate sustains persistent self-generated structures beyond one bounded closure.

obligations.invariant: A Bubble can lawfully generate its own connected internal whole without the host inventing missing world semantics.
remainingLimits: Internal laws now generate a bounded causal closure and generic structure, but they do not generate the whole field schema, law set, entity population, or multi-world universe.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open through every partial self-generation slice.

obligations.concept: emergent agency and autonomous narrative possibility
obligations.invariant: A Bubble may lawfully form persistent beings, agency, relations, and coherent histories without requiring those labels as primitive fields or making them depend on World Will.
remainingLimits: Generic structure can emerge and explicit protagonist stories remain representable, but no persistent identity, self-maintenance, goals, relationships, or narrative projection is derived from the general substrate yet.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open until an unlabeled persistent structure satisfies explicit boundary, memory, self-maintenance, and counterfactual agency criteria.

obligations.concept: objective World Will and anchor-mediated intervention
obligations.invariant: World Will acts under explicit objective and constraint structure, and any cross-world intervention is carried by an anchor with identity and causal provenance.
remainingLimits: World Will executes exact bounded objective/cost/constraint optimization through local anchors and cannot write protected structure, but cross-world transfer and a full identity calculus remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open until anchor-cut and World-Will-disabled counterfactuals discriminate the mechanisms.

obligations.invariant: Positive and negative seas materially alter world viability, continuity, and intervention conditions without becoming moral labels or decorative scores.
remainingLimits: Exact local sea projections change viability after causal events, but global multi-world sea transport and membrane dynamics remain open.
obligations.reopenCondition: Remains open until dynamic sea pressure changes a lawful narrative outcome through an inspectable causal path.

obligations.invariant: Natural language preserves intent but executable truth is a typed formal object able to denote unbounded and infinite-dimensional structures without eager enumeration.
remainingLimits: The kernel covers exact countable index products, guarded natural recursion, and state-bound narrative queries, not uncountable domains, coinductive streams, symbolic limits, integration, or authored Bubble-syntax lowering.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen whenever a required Bubble object cannot be denoted or queried without opaque host behavior.

obligations.invariant: The meaning of the unique or core world and its anchor relation must remain explicit; no implementation may silently install one privileged absolute original.
remainingLimits: Lineage-relative addressing exists, but the intended topology of 고유 세계 remains an author question.
obligations.reopenCondition: Must be resolved with the author before a root-world hierarchy becomes executable semantics.

obligations.invariant: A future Bubble may generate modules, a successor form of itself, and executable formal code only with preserved semantics, provenance, verification, and resource boundaries.
remainingLimits: Current Bubble can stage artifacts, grammar descriptions, and bounded internal causal events but cannot generate, verify, rebuild, or execute a successor implementation of itself.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen only after every prior obligation is realized and the author explicitly accepts the current Bubble universe as complete.

obligations.invariant: The universal Bubble core is causal world structure rather than a mandatory plot schema, while agent and narrative structures remain lawfully realizable rather than forbidden.
remainingLimits: The actor-neutral substrate generates bounded structure, but persistent entities, agency, relationships, narrative projection, cyclic dynamics, and whole-universe generation are not yet derived.
obligations.reopenCondition: Reopen at the smallest concrete persistent structure that requires identity, memory, self-maintenance, goals, or relations beyond the generic emergence predicate.

sessionConstraints.rule: The v0.5.1 development session was required to leave its completion work uncommitted for author review.
v0.5.2 must preserve the pre-implementation philosophy and correct v0.5.1 by forward generalization rather than rewriting the pushed release.
